creator: laurent@daverio.net
text:
(In reply to Laurent Daverio from comment #3)

Just tested on a "fresh" machine (binary installed FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE in 2021,  binary upgraded to 13.1-RELEASE, then 13.2-RELEASE. Same results.

I'm currently trying a `portupgrade -Rf`, not sure it will help, tough.

Is there a way to find the binary package easily?
